prompt: Our team is evaluating Bun vs Deno for a greenfield TypeScript backend service. We care about: runtime performance, npm ecosystem compatibility, tooling maturity, and production readiness in 2025. Can you research this thoroughly and tell us which one is actually better for this use case?
assertions: Both Bun and Deno are researched (not just one)
Sources are annotated with T1-T4 tiers
Contradictions or uncertainties between sources are explicitly mentioned
A recommendation or comparative conclusion is provided
